text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen has finally arrived, and Mejiro
Dober is overwhelmed by the caliber of the senior
racers she's to compete against.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when Air Groove appears, exuding her
usual oppressive air, and Mejiro Dober finds
herself nearly suffocated by it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mejiro Dober refuses to be overwhelmed and
stands her ground! The final race of her classic
year is about to begin!
